LeidenUniv.Tools

Class Polar_Circularity

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.Tools.Polar_Circularity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.plugin.PlugIn

    public class Polar_Circularity
extends java.lang.Object
implements ij.plugin.PlugIn
    Plugin for measuring the polar circularity on a ROI Based on Stojmenovic M, Jevremovic A, Nayak A (2013) Fast iris detection via shape based circularity. In: 2013 8th IEEE conference on industrial electronics and applications (ICIEA) 19–21 June 2013, pp 747–752
    Author:
    willemsejj

      double getPolarCircularity(ij.gui.Roi cRoi, ij.ImagePlus imp)
      Get the polar circularity of a roi, can also be called from a plugin

      For running the plugin in ImageJ/FIJI

      • run

        For running the plugin in ImageJ/FIJI

      • getPolarCircularity

        public double getPolarCircularity(ij.gui.Roi cRoi,
                                  ij.ImagePlus imp)
        Get the polar circularity of a roi, can also be called from a plugin
        Parameters:
        cRoi - ROI to work on
        imp - Image to work on
        Returns:
        The Polar circularity of the ROI
